_comment: PRE-REGISTERED oracle-label budget ledger. Some gates depend on a SCARCE label source (human graders, a metered proprietary judge, a held-out gold set that can be spent). When an oracle's supply is exhausted, the gates that draw on it must FAIL CLOSED TO NON-BLOCKING ('advisory') rather than silently passing on stale/empty labels — a gate that always passes is worse than no gate. This ledger tracks per-oracle availability and spend, and names which gates each oracle feeds. Counts are conservative placeholders, NOT a claim of labels actually collected; a demoted gate makes NO capability claim.

human_gold_anchor.description: One-time human-graded gold anchor for judge calibration (measurement-thesis pillar 7).

metered_judge_openrouter.description: Metered proprietary LLM-judge inference; each blocking eval draws labels from this budget.

heldout_gold_set.description: Private held-out gold items; spending them contaminates them, so supply is finite by design.
